---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="container py-5">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="hero-section">
    <img src="assets/images/Canon-0806.JPG" alt="Tim Chen" class="hero-photo">
    <h1 class="hero-name">Tim Chen</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">
      Software engineer and data analyst based in Toronto. I build workflow
      automations at ElectionBuddy and have shipped frontend features with
      TypeScript and React. At UofT I study mathematics with a focus on
      probability and statistics — which means I also spend a lot of time in
      R and Python building models and finding patterns in data.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a href="mailto:timchen0326ca@gmail.com" class="btn btn-dark btn-sm">Email</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/timchen0326" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/timchen0326/" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="assets/pdfs/resume_2025.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">Resume</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr style="border-color: #E5E7EB; margin: 2.5rem 0;">

  <!-- SKILLS -->
  <div class="mb-5">
    <div class="section-label">Skills</div>
    <div>
      <span class="skill-badge">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">R</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">SQL</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">TypeScript</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">JavaScript</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">Java</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">React</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">Tableau</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">Power BI</span>
      <span class="skill-badge">Quarto</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- EXPERIENCE -->
  <div class="mb-5">
    <div class="section-label">Experience</div>
    <div class="row g-3">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="exp-card">
          <div class="exp-role">Junior Software Engineer</div>
          <div class="exp-company">ElectionBuddy</div>
          <div class="exp-period">2025 – Present</div>
          <p>Building workflow automations across finance, onboarding, and admin teams using Zapier, QuickBooks Online, and Paperform to reduce manual effort and improve process reliability.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="exp-card">
          <div class="exp-role">Frontend Software Engineer Intern</div>
          <div class="exp-company">MAYOHR</div>
          <div class="exp-period">2024</div>
          <p>Developed features with TypeScript, React, and RESTful APIs. Used Python for frontend testing to streamline integration and improve troubleshooting workflows.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FEATURED PROJECTS -->
  <div class="mb-4">
    <div class="section-label">Featured Projects</div>
    <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-4 g-3">

      <div class="col">
        <a href="projects/student-analysis.html" class="project-card">
          <div class="card-tag">Data Analysis</div>
          <h3>Student Habits &amp; Performance</h3>
          <p>Explores how lifestyle factors predict academic outcomes using regression and visualization on 80K records.</p>
          <span class="tech-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">pandas</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">seaborn</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="col">
        <a href="projects/ml-challenge.html" class="project-card">
          <div class="card-tag">Machine Learning</div>
          <h3>CSC311 ML Food Classifier</h3>
          <p>Multinomial Naïve Bayes classifier achieving 87% accuracy to predict food items from survey data.</p>
          <span class="tech-tag">Python</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">scikit-learn</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Streamlit</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="col">
        <a href="projects/toronto-crime-analysis.html" class="project-card">
          <div class="card-tag">Statistical Modelling</div>
          <h3>Toronto Crime Patterns</h3>
          <p>Bayesian logistic regression uncovering how premises type and time of day shape violent crime risk.</p>
          <span class="tech-tag">R</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">Bayesian</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">rstanarm</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="col">
        <a href="projects/us-presidential-election.html" class="project-card">
          <div class="card-tag">Statistical Modelling</div>
          <h3>2024 U.S. Election Forecast</h3>
          <p>State-level polling regression model predicting Electoral College outcomes for the 2024 presidential race.</p>
          <span class="tech-tag">R</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">regression</span>
          <span class="tech-tag">polling data</span>
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="text-end">
    <a href="projects.html" class="view-all-link">View all projects →</a>
  </div>

</div>
```
